description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a full military uniform, including a short-sleeved shirt, matching pants, and a cap, all featuring a camouflage pattern. The figure stands upright with arms slightly extended outward and fingers relaxed. The uniform is loose-fitting and appears to be made from a fabric material, while the boots are sturdy and reach above the ankles, likely made from a tougher material such as leather or rubber. The face is clean-shaven, and the head is covered by a standard-issue military cap. The overall build is athletic and proportionate, with no visible accessories or carried items. The figure's posture is neutral, suggesting readiness or attention.
description: An adult male in a camouflage military uniform and cap, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched and wearing sturdy boots.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full camouflage uniform, cap, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the cap, uniform fit, and the side of the boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the uniform, cap, and boots, with arms extended to the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, uniform, and boots from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: military uniform with short-sleeved shirt, matching pants, and cap
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by cap
